not_claimed: T542 does not establish a source law, prove a shadow-protection theorem, derive spacetime, prove manifoldlikeness, repair T528, reverse T223, unpause S1, promote S1, change claim status, change Canon Index tiers, change canon verdicts, change public posture, change the North Star, authorize external publication, or move cross-repo truth.
